title: orthocarpus schizotrichus
intro: Orthocarpus schizotrichus, also known as the desert orthocarpus or broom-pod, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Orthocarpus schizotrichus include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations, making it a popular choice in traditional herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and soothe skin conditions.
